features: Embeddable tooltip widget — add Wowhead-style hoverable tooltips to any website with a single script tag, supporting all 13 entity types
Developer documentation page at /developers — widget installation guide, full API endpoint reference, code examples in cURL/Python/JavaScript
Character hub pages — expanded character detail pages with collapsible sections for all character-specific cards and character pool relics
Character comparison pages at /compare — 10 character pair comparisons with side-by-side stats, card pool breakdowns, keyword distribution, and starting deck comparison
Keyword hub pages at /keywords — dedicated pages for each keyword listing all cards with that keyword, with search and character filter
Compendium sort order — cards, relics, and potions now support sorting by in-game compendium order with A-Z, Z-A, and Compendium options
Cross-language entity names — collapsible Other languages section on all detail pages showing localized names across all 14 supported languages
Related cards section on card detail pages — shows cards sharing the same keywords or tags
High-resolution renders of Neow (2048x2048) and Tezcatara (2048x2048) from Spine skeletal animations
fixes: 19 inherited powers now display correct type, stack type, and description instead of empty data
3 abstract base power classes removed from output (260 to 257 powers)
Upgraded starter relics assigned to correct character pool instead of shared
Event choice ordering matches in-game C# source instead of alphabetical
Sitemap changed to flat XML with force-dynamic (15 to 1,384 URLs)
Navbar labels updated to match in-game compendium names
api_changes: New endpoint: GET /api/names/{entity_type}/{entity_id} — cross-language name lookup
New field: compendium_order on Card, Relic, and Potion schemas
Cards endpoint now supports ?tag= filter parameter
FAQPage and VideoGame JSON-LD schemas added
